---
applyTo: "**/*Migration*.php,**/*Model*.php,**/*Controller*.php,**/*Service*.php,**/*Repository*.php"
---

**Skill:** `.github/skills/performance/SKILL.md`

Note: This Tier 1 wrapper uses Laravel-flavored defaults. If the active stack differs, run `/detect-stack`; Tier 2 `toji-stack-*.instructions.md` patterns are regenerated stack-specifically and take over path matching.
